string 2: You hear Aegiomon talking to Inori downstairs.
So, yeah! We've gotta go! You, too, Inori!

Sounds like you had a blast. Sure, I'll go to 
Shinjuku Park with you.
What time did you agree to meet your friends?
Time? Um... I dunno...

But I'm sure they're there already! They might leave if we 
don't hurry! C'mon! Let's go!
Oh, hey there, {player}. You're coming, too, right?
You said you would yesterday! Remember?

He's been like this all morning. I wouldn't feel comfortable
letting him go off alone...
I'd like to go along, too...
I'll go as well.{next}
You two are class-A anomalies, so I have to watch you.
Your actions might be tied to the end of the world...
Um, what? I don't really know what that means...
I had a feeling you'd say that, {player}. You really are a good person.
Woo hoo! Then, c'mon! Let's go, guys!
Hey, {player}! The footprints lead through that door.
What's this place...?
I came here with your dad and encountered Digimon down below.{next}
Must lead to the Shinjuku underground where the Digimon are.{next}
If we go forward, we might be attacked by Digimon...{next}

This is bad, then! Really bad! What if those kids run into 
some mean Digimon down there?!

That's definitely a scary thought. If they went in there,
we'd better get them out, fast.
What in the world...?
I sense something...!
It's my friends!
No time to lose!
Aegiomon!

Whoa! What is all this? Who would've thought there'd be a
place like this down here...?
It's an anomaly for sure...!{next}
Have we been spirited away by ghosts or something?{next}
Could this be some kind of sign of the end of the world...?{next}
Hey, don't scare me like that...
I can feel it... My friends are there!
C'mon! We've gotta go save them!
...Are you nervous?{next}
Don't worry. I'm right here with you.{next}
This agent will protect you, no matter what.{next}

Unlike Aegiomon, I'm just a plain old, ordinary human,
after all...
...so I get nervous in weird, scary places like this...
...Huh?
"I'm just a plain ol', ordinary human, too," you say?
Oh, yeah. That's right. I totally forgot.

That outfit's to blame, if you ask me... Hee hee! You look
like a character out of an anime.

Okay, thanks. I've calmed down a little. You know...
you're a good person, {player}.

Geh geh geh! Ya got some fine energy, there, for a puny 
little rug rat!

This place is great! We can hole up here, and make nice,
cushy lives for ourselves nabbin' pint-sized pushovers!
Gegege!
Oh, no...! We have to help!

Huh? What's this? More lambs to the slaughter? Looks like there are
some big bleaters in the mix, too, though...
In the name of ADAMAS, I'm taking those kids back!{next}
Special Investigation Bureau ADAMAS! Hold it right there!{next}
Preying on humans is NOT cool!{next}
Excuse me? Who do ya think you're talkin' to, punk?!
Right where, exactly? Ya wanna put yer money where yer mouth is?!
How I sup my supper ain't got nothin' to do with you!

That's right. I'm talkin' to YOU, my scrumptious-lookin' 
second course!
Ya gotta be... kiddin' me...
This is how I go out? What about my nice, cushy life?!
Energy! I need your energy, RIGHT NOW!
GIVE MEEE!
Aaaaagh!
Look out!
*panting*
Whew...
Hey, it's okay now.
C'mon. Take my hand. Then we can go play tag—
AAAAAAAGH!
Y-You... YOU'RE a monster, TOO!
Hah.. Hah...
It's so pretty...

You can see better without the hat on. It's okay, no one's 
looking right now...
Um...
All those little lights... What are they?
They're stars. Huge, glowing balls of hot gas, far, far away.
But in the past, people used to think that those lights were gods.
..."Gods"?
Yup, that's right.

They believed that connecting the lights with lines would reveal what
the gods looked like. They made up all kinds of stories about them, too.
...Stories?
Heh.
...Urk.

Yeah, like for example... A hero coming to our world from another world,
in order to save it. Stories like that.
Gods... Worlds... Heroes... I don't really get any of that.
You might be one of those heroes, yourself.
Me? A... hero?

Mmm-hmm. A real, honest-to-goodness champion, who came from 
another world to save this one.
I mean, today, you...
Ung...
Ack...
Today, you were a true hero, if you ask me. No doubt about it!
So, hey. Hold your head up high, okay?
But I'm... scared. If something like today ever happens again, I—
Don't worry. I'll always be right here with you.
Always... with me...?
Yup, always and forever. After all...
...that's all I've ever wished for.
I lost my mother and little brother, you see.

My little brother's name was Yuu... He was just about 
as big as you are now, Aegiomon.
So when you showed up wearing that hoodie...
...it kind of felt like... My Little Yuu had come back.
That's why I'll always be by your side.

Like those stars up above, I'll always be where you can 
see me, Aegiomon.
You will? Okay...
